title: Copper Soldiers
description: A resource pack that adds military helmets to copper golems depending on the biome.
body:
![Copper golems from desert biome in the trenches with title Copper Soldiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b884b3111bd725318c6ba8b7124beee45252d52f.jpeg)

<hr>

# About


Copper Soldiers is a resource pack that adds helmets to copper golems based on the biome. They are ready for war.

# Required EMF

This resource pack uses an OptiFine feature called custom entity models (CEM) to add new models. 
Tested compatibility with OptiFine and EMF. Currently, OptiFine does not support modifying the copper golem's model, so the resource pack will not work only with it. For everything to function correctly, EMF and ETF are required. 
### !You can use both, Optifine and EMF; or use fabric and EMF.

[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

![Copper golems in forest trench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2549bdbee9e655f19861fbc30d4f71681daa28e4.jpeg)


# Content
At that moment, 5 variations of the golem have been added, based on the biome. Unfortunately, the capabilities of OptiFine and EMF are limited, and I haven't found a way to preserve the statue's texture according to its pose, except for the standing position (it will match the biome where the statue is placed, so creating an army of soldiers is possible). Statues in other poses will have a random color based on the tile they are standing on (this is actually an advantage, as it allows for creating decorations from different golems within the same biome).
